title: Does Ritsuko know about Misato being the sole survivor of 2nd Impact

wikitext:
[]: Does Ritsuko know about Misato being the sole survivor of 2nd Impact?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Wed Aug 21, 2024 1:26 pm If yes why did she talk about it before Shinji and Misato? Shouldn't she care about Misato's emotion?

[]: Re: Does Ritsuko know about Misato being the sole survivor of 2nd Impact?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Aug 24, 2024 10:58 am I guess Ritsuko didn't think it'd hurt her, but moreover we do know she's a lousy friend.
